# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:22.04

LABEL maintainer="devteam@example.com"
LABEL description="All-in-one development container with web server, API server, PostgreSQL, and Redis"

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get upgrade -y && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    nginx \
    nodejs \
    npm \
    postgresql \
    postgresql-contrib \
    redis-server \
    supervisor \
    curl \
    ca-certificates \
    gosu \
    && apt-get clean \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* /tmp/* /var/tmp/*

RUN groupadd -r appgroup && \
    useradd -r -g appgroup -m -s /bin/bash appuser

RUN mkdir -p /var/log/supervisor && \
    mkdir -p /app/api && \
    mkdir -p /app/web && \
    mkdir -p /var/run/postgresql && \
    mkdir -p /var/run/redis && \
    mkdir -p /data/postgres && \
    mkdir -p /data/redis

COPY supervisord.conf /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf

COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/sites-available/default

COPY api/ /app/api/

WORKDIR /app/api
RUN npm install --production 2>/dev/null || true

RUN sed -i "s|data_directory = .*|data_directory = '/data/postgres'|" /etc/postgresql/*/main/postgresql.conf && \
    echo "listen_addresses = '127.0.0.1'" >> /etc/postgresql/*/main/postgresql.conf && \
    echo "password_encryption = scram-sha-256" >> /etc/postgresql/*/main/postgresql.conf && \
    echo "ssl = off" >> /etc/postgresql/*/main/postgresql.conf && \
    sed -i "s|local   all             all                                     peer|local   all             all                                     scram-sha-256|" /etc/postgresql/*/main/pg_hba.conf && \
    sed -i "s|host    all             all             127.0.0.1/32            .*|host    all             all             127.0.0.1/32            scram-sha-256|" /etc/postgresql/*/main/pg_hba.conf && \
    sed -i "/host    all             all             ::1/d" /etc/postgresql/*/main/pg_hba.conf

RUN echo "bind 127.0.0.1" > /etc/redis/redis-custom.conf && \
    echo "port 6379" >> /etc/redis/redis-custom.conf && \
    echo "protected-mode yes" >> /etc/redis/redis-custom.conf && \
    echo "requirepass changeme_in_env" >> /etc/redis/redis-custom.conf && \
    echo "dir /data/redis" >> /etc/redis/redis-custom.conf && \
    echo "maxmemory 256mb" >> /etc/redis/redis-custom.conf && \
    echo "maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru" >> /etc/redis/redis-custom.conf && \
    echo "rename-command FLUSHALL \"\"" >> /etc/redis/redis-custom.conf && \
    echo "rename-command FLUSHDB \"\"" >> /etc/redis/redis-custom.conf && \
    echo "rename-command DEBUG \"\"" >> /etc/redis/redis-custom.conf

COPY entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh
RUN chmod 755 /entrypoint.sh

RUN chown -R postgres:postgres /var/run/postgresql /data/postgres && \
    chmod 700 /data/postgres && \
    chown -R redis:redis /var/run/redis /data/redis && \
    chmod 700 /data/redis && \
    chown -R appuser:appgroup /app && \
    chown -R root:root /var/log/supervisor && \
    chmod 750 /var/log/supervisor

RUN chmod 600 /etc/redis/redis-custom.conf && \
    chown redis:redis /etc/redis/redis-custom.conf

EXPOSE 80
EXPOSE 8080
EXPOSE 5432
EXPOSE 6379

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=60s --retries=3 \
    CMD curl -f http://127.0.0.1:80/ > /dev/null 2>&1 && \
        curl -f http://127.0.0.1:8080/health > /dev/null 2>&1 && \
        pg_isready -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5432 > /dev/null 2>&1 && \
        redis-cli -h 127.0.0.1 -p 6379 -a "${REDIS_PASSWORD:-changeme_in_env}" ping > /dev/null 2>&1 \
    || exit 1

ENV NODE_ENV=development
ENV PGDATA=/data/postgres
ENV REDIS_PASSWORD=changeme_in_env

ENTRYPOINT ["/entrypoint.sh"]
CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord", "-c", "/etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf"]
